untranslatable_reason: Signal requires rank-based universe selection (1,000 largest by market cap + 10 lowest-priced stocks) and equal-weighted portfolio allocation. These are portfolio construction and ranking operations that cannot be expressed using only price/indicator conditions and comparison operators. The signal also requires market cap filtering which is not in the allowed indicators list.
translation_notes: This is a stock ranking and selection strategy rather than a price/technical-indicator rule. Implementation requires: (1) market cap data to filter universe, (2) price ranking within that universe, (3) equal-weight position sizing across 10 stocks, (4) annual rebalancing. None of these can be expressed with the allowed indicator set. The strategy is fundamentally untranslatable to the single-stock rule format of this engine.
